\setcounter{section}{0}
\renewcommand{\thesection}{\Alph{section}}

\setcounter{table}{0}
\renewcommand{\thetable}{A\arabic{table}}

\setcounter{figure}{0}
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{A\arabic{figure}}

# Appendix {.appendix}

\scriptsize
{{< include assets/table-countries-gdp-labor.txt >}}
: GDP per capita, and agricultural and service labor shares
{#tbl-gdp-labor-shares}

\normalsize
